docket_entries.description: AUTO ACCIDENT CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $2,200.00 FILED BY SOSA,LUIS AS TO DEFENDANT VAESAU, PETER TOFU ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR OCT-29-1992 AT 08:00 AM IN DEPT 00
TRIAL RESET TO NOV-20-1992 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 02 TRIAL OF OCT-29-1992 IS TAKEN OFF CALENDAR
SUBSTITUTED PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT VAESAU, PETER TOFU

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF SOSA,LUIS RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT VAESAU, PETER TOFU $2,200.00 PRINCIPAL, $28.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $2,228.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
